def positive_service_method_returns_http_response_object():
    rule_id = "service_method_returns_http_response_object"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Service-layer method returns an HTTP response object that belongs to the transport layer."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
